name: mythosforge-audio
description: Generate audio via Replicate: text-to-speech (tts), music/ambience (music), or sound effects (sfx). Bring your own REPLICATE_API_TOKEN. No wallet, no payment.

text.note: speech text for tts, or the prompt for music/sfx

voice.note: tts only: MiniMax system voice id (default Wise_Woman)

format.note: tts audio_format (mp3/wav/flac/pcm) or music output_format (wav/mp3); sfx is wav

model.note: override the Replicate model slug for the op (must match the op's input fields)

output: JSON line on stdout: { ok, op, text, path, bytes }. Read `path` for the written audio file.

runtimes.tool-use-llm: hand tool-schema.json (openai or anthropic block) to the model; host runs invoke on the tool call. Works with OpenAI, Anthropic, Bankr LLM Gateway, Surplus, and any function-calling model.
